What it is

A sophisticated CLI orchestration manager defining resilient Multi-Agent collaborative workflows utilizing strictly Git worktrees guaranteeing precisely state persistence executing across deeply complex engineering projects effectively.

Problems solved

Eliminates entirely catastrophic context amnesia inherent within standard agent sessions wrapping fundamentally agent tasks inside persistent Git nodes maintaining perfectly isolated memory continuity mitigating completely destructive cross-agent overwrites.

How to get started

Download Go binaries running gt install ~/gt --git invoking explicitly gt mayor attach describing natively your target architecture routing explicit Sub-Agent assignments directly.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

Gas Town positions itself fundamentally optimizing exactly advanced Claude Code interactions building specifically an operating-system layer directing gracefully multi-agent concurrency simulating identically physical corporate software divisions precisely.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Scaling AI workflows beyond primitive single-agent prompts results inherently in chaotic contextual degradation. Gas Town fundamentally repairs this implementing exact Git hook "propulsion" tracking discrete behavioral states persisting flawlessly agent logic surviving application crashes absolutely assuring structural resilience permanently.

3. Technical Architecture

A deeply native Go-based CLI interacting structurally managing discrete KuzuDB/Dolt tables wrapping fundamentally system-level execution contexts allocating specific TMUX sessions executing precisely isolated Git worker trees robustly.

4. Core Implementation

Initiates "Mayor" nodes processing macro user instructions predicting explicitly required child tasks allocating exactly functional "Polecat" agents formatting distinct gt sling commands mapping explicit work definitions committing sequentially progressive state changes protecting structurally root repositories efficiently.

5. Code Organization

Orchestrated primarily around standard Go hierarchies manipulating distinctly internal process layers (/cmd, /internal) establishing rigorous abstractions parsing explicitly native TOML workflow formulas routing exactly terminal user interfaces seamlessly.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Execute specifically gt feed --problems simulating exactly dozens of concurrent agent nodes identifying quickly exactly how the telemetry terminal recognizes "Stalled" or "Zombie" agent logic executing precise recovery mechanisms smoothly.

7. Summary

An immensely powerful architectural orchestrator standardizing flawlessly massive recursive agent functions leveraging brilliantly robust native Git components establishing phenomenally persistent virtual workforces securely.
